title: Vanilla Overkill - Base Edition
description: A simple vanilla modpack surrounding the Blaze and Caves advancement challenge. This collection includes both visual enhancements and optimizations.
body: A simple vanilla modpack surrounding the [Blaze and Caves](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blazeandcaves-advancements-pack) advancement challenge. This collection includes both visual enhancements and optimizations.
